name: Squash Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the squash.
2. Cut the squash into 1/4 x 1/8 inch slices.
3. Cut the onions and peppers in the same size pieces.
4. Place the chopped vegetables in a large container.
5. Sprinkle salt over the vegetables and add ice cubes.
6. Cover the container and let stand for 3 hours.
7. Drain and rinse the vegetables.
8. Mix sugar, turmeric, mustard, vinegar, celery seed, and black pepper in a large pot.
9. Place the mixture on medium heat until it is just below boiling point.
10. Add the drained and rinsed vegetables to the jar.
11. Heat the mixture and place into jars.
